type: 神经网络架构图（neural network architecture diagram）
goal: 生成论文级别的 encoder-only Transformer 架构图：层级清晰、tensor shape 标注、残差可辨、可灰度印刷

model_meta.name: Our Encoder Transformer (L=12, d=768, h=8)
model_meta.input_spec: Input: token IDs, shape B × L; + learned position + segment embeddings
model_meta.output_spec: Class Logits: B × C (optional [CLS] pool), or per-token B × L × d for seq. tagging

layer_groups.rule: use color-coded blocks per layer type — keep palette ≤ 5 muted academic colors

items.name: Encoder Stack: LN → MHA(h=8) → res → LN → FFN(d_ff=3072) → res (×N=12)

block_style.size_rule: blocks of same layer type share identical width; encoder stack shown as a tall column with a brace labeled ×12
block_style.fill: use the type's fill color (very light tint)
block_style.label_text: layer name on first line (sans-serif bold 10-11pt) + tensor shape on second line (monospace italic 9pt)
block_style.annotation_text: curly brace on the right of the repeated encoder block with label '× N=12'

main_flow.style: thin black solid arrows (1.2px), left → right through embed → stack → pool → head

residual.style: curved dashed arrow arcing around each (Attn+FFN) sub-block, label '+' at merge
residual.rule: Pre-LN residual around attention and FFN as in modern transformer blocks

highlight_novelty.rule: if true, surround the user's contributed module with a thicker dashed orange border + label 'Ours'

must_keep: tensor shapes in monospace; English labels
white background; no gradient; grayscale-readable shapes
residual skip visually explicit where applicable
avoid: missing d_model / L / head count on the diagram
